title: Interactic Renewed
description: A maintained fork of the populair interactic mod.
body:
# Interactic Renewed

**Refined item interactions - actively maintained with ongoing fixes and improvements**

Interactic Renewed is a maintained fork of [Interactic](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic) by glisco, kept up to date with bug fixes and support for current Minecraft versions. Many of its features are inspired by ItemPhysic, but built from the ground up for Fabric.

---

## Features

All features can be individually toggled in the config.

### Fancy Item Rendering
Items spin while falling, at a speed that changes depending on how fast they fall. When on the ground they lay flat and compact into stacks.

### Enhanced Pickup and Tooltips
Pick up items by right clicking them, even from a few blocks away. When looking at an item entity, its tooltip is rendered below your crosshair.

### Item Filter
The Item Filter is a special item that lets you finely control which items you want to automatically pick up. Configure it to use either a whitelist or blacklist - items affected by the list require explicit pickup via right click or by sneaking. You can also globally disable auto-pickup in the config to force all items to be picked up explicitly.

### Item Throwing
Hold down the drop key to throw items. The longer you hold, the further you throw. Items with a damage modifier (swords, axes) will deal damage when they hit a mob after being thrown.

### Client-Only Mode
Interactic Renewed can be used in a mode where it automatically disables all server-side features, giving you only the enhanced rendering and tooltips without needing the mod on the server.

---

## Bug Fixes over the original

- **ItemFilter slot removal ignored the amount parameter** - always deleted the entire stack regardless of how many were requested. Fixed to properly handle partial removals.
- **ItemFilter inventory changes were not saved** - changes to the filter inventory could be lost on world reload. Fixed.
- **Deprecated block outline shape API** - updated to the correct modern API, removing a deprecation warning.
- **Mixin compatibility level was incorrect** - corrected to the proper Java version for each Minecraft version.
- **Item filter UI always registered on client startup** - screen and networking now only register when the item filter feature is enabled in config.

---

## Supported Versions

| Minecraft | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| 1.21.1 | ✅ Active |
| 1.20.1 | ✅ Active |

More versions may be added over time.

---

## Dependencies

- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) >= 0.19.1
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

---

## Credits

- [glisco](https://github.com/gliscowo) - original Interactic mod
- [EmpireWarrior](https://github.com/EmpireWarrior81) - Interactic Renewed (fork, bug fixes, updates)

---

*This mod is not affiliated with the original Interactic project.*
